category_sources: Official Linux Foundation page says iproute2 is a collection of utilities for TCP/IP networking and traffic control in Linux.
source_facts.description says iproute2 provides Linux routing utilities.
display_name_sources: Official Linux Foundation page at https://wiki.linuxfoundation.org/networking/iproute2 uses the name iproute2.
docs_sources: Official kernel.org repository README is an upstream source documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official Linux Foundation iproute2 page and includes introduction, download, and documentation notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Linux Foundation page states the current iproute2 source is maintained in the git.kernel.org repository.
source_facts.source-archive is from kernel.org, supporting kernel.org as upstream distribution infrastructure.
tags_sources: Official Linux Foundation page highlights ip, tc, TCP/IP networking, and traffic control.
